x-enumeration-literals.name: Issued
x-enumeration-literals.description: The device has been created and delivered to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Active
x-enumeration-literals.description: The device is fully functional and ready for use.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspended
x-enumeration-literals.description: The device is temporarily disabled, for example due to loss or theft.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Revoked
x-enumeration-literals.description: The device has been permanently disabled and cannot be used.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expired
x-enumeration-literals.description: The devices validity period has ended.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Replaced
x-enumeration-literals.description: The device has been superseded by a new device.
